qEnglish: According to ISRO's Atlas (2021), which is the most responsible factor for desertification in Rajasthan?
qHindi: According to ISRO's Atlas (2021), which is the most responsible factor for desertification in Rajasthan?
explanationEnglish: Wind erosion is the leading cause of desertification in Rajasthan, contributing significantly to soil loss and dune movement in the arid west[cite: 232, 237].
explanationHindi: पवन अपरदन राजस्थान में मरुस्थलीकरण का प्रमुख कारण है, जो शुष्क पश्चिम में मिट्टी के नुकसान और रेत के टीलों की गतिशीलता में महत्वपूर्ण योगदान देता है [cite: 232, 237]।
subject: भूगोल
